questions.q: By what nickname is the Hindi film actor Shah Rukh Khan most popularly known?
questions.explanation: Shah Rukh Khan is widely known as the 'King of Bollywood' (and 'King Khan') for his decades-long dominance of Hindi cinema.

questions.q: In which year was the actor Shah Rukh Khan born?
questions.explanation: Shah Rukh Khan was born on 2 November 1965 in New Delhi.

questions.q: In which 1995 romantic blockbuster did Shah Rukh Khan play the character Raj Malhotra opposite Kajol?
questions.explanation: Shah Rukh Khan played Raj Malhotra in Aditya Chopra's Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge (1995), one of Hindi cinema's most iconic romances.

questions.q: Which actress played the female lead opposite Shah Rukh Khan in Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge (1995)?
questions.explanation: Kajol played Simran opposite Shah Rukh Khan's Raj in Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge.

questions.q: In which 1993 thriller did Shah Rukh Khan play a vengeful anti-hero named Ajay Sharma, helping establish his early stardom?
questions.explanation: Shah Rukh Khan played the scheming Ajay Sharma in Baazigar (1993), a negative role that won him his first Filmfare Best Actor award.

questions.q: Which production company did Shah Rukh Khan co-found, becoming a major force in film production and visual effects?
questions.explanation: Shah Rukh Khan co-founded Red Chillies Entertainment, which produces films and houses a noted VFX studio.

questions.q: Which two films marked Shah Rukh Khan's major box-office comeback in 2023?
options: Chennai Express and Happy New Year
questions.explanation: Pathaan and Jawan, both released in 2023, returned Shah Rukh Khan to box-office dominance after a break from leading roles.

questions.q: In which Indian city was the actor Shah Rukh Khan born and raised before moving to Mumbai?
questions.explanation: Shah Rukh Khan was born and grew up in New Delhi before relocating to Mumbai to pursue a film career.

questions.q: In which 1998 Karan Johar directorial debut did Shah Rukh Khan star alongside Kajol and Rani Mukerji?
questions.explanation: Shah Rukh Khan played Rahul in Kuch Kuch Hota Hai (1998), Karan Johar's directorial debut.

questions.q: Shah Rukh Khan first became famous in the late 1980s through which medium before his film career?
questions.explanation: Shah Rukh Khan gained early fame on television in serials such as Fauji and Circus before entering films.

questions.q: In Mani Ratnam's Dil Se (1998), Shah Rukh Khan featured in which famous song picturised atop a moving train?
questions.explanation: The song 'Chaiyya Chaiyya', composed by A. R. Rahman, was filmed with Shah Rukh Khan dancing on top of a moving train.

questions.q: For which 2002 film did Shah Rukh Khan play the title role of a doomed romantic who descends into alcoholism?
questions.explanation: Shah Rukh Khan played the title character in Sanjay Leela Bhansali's Devdas (2002), opposite Aishwarya Rai and Madhuri Dixit.

questions.q: In the 2007 sports drama Chak De! India, what role did Shah Rukh Khan play?
questions.explanation: Shah Rukh Khan played Kabir Khan, coach of the Indian women's national field hockey team, in Chak De! India (2007).

questions.q: In the 1993 thriller Darr, Shah Rukh Khan played a character obsessed with a woman played by which actress?
questions.explanation: In Yash Chopra's Darr (1993), Shah Rukh Khan played Rahul, who stalks Kiran, played by Juhi Chawla.

questions.q: Which IPL cricket franchise is co-owned by Shah Rukh Khan?
questions.explanation: Shah Rukh Khan co-owns the Indian Premier League team Kolkata Knight Riders through Red Chillies Entertainment.

questions.q: In the 2004 film Swades, Shah Rukh Khan played an NRI working at which organization who returns to rural India?
questions.explanation: In Swades (2004), Shah Rukh Khan played Mohan Bhargava, a NASA scientist who returns to his Indian village.

questions.q: Which civilian honour was conferred on Shah Rukh Khan by the Government of India in 2005?
questions.explanation: Shah Rukh Khan was awarded the Padma Shri, India's fourth-highest civilian honour, in 2005.

questions.q: In the 2010 film My Name Is Khan, directed by Karan Johar, what condition does Shah Rukh Khan's character Rizwan Khan have?
questions.explanation: In My Name Is Khan (2010), Shah Rukh Khan played Rizwan Khan, a man with Asperger's syndrome.

questions.q: Which 2013 action-comedy directed by Rohit Shetty paired Shah Rukh Khan with Deepika Padukone on a train journey across South India?
questions.explanation: Chennai Express (2013) starred Shah Rukh Khan and Deepika Padukone and was a major box-office success.

questions.q: In Aditya Chopra's 2008 film Rab Ne Bana Di Jodi, Shah Rukh Khan played a meek office worker and which flamboyant alter ego?
questions.explanation: In Rab Ne Bana Di Jodi (2008), Shah Rukh Khan played the shy Surinder Sahni and his flamboyant alter ego 'Raj'.

questions.q: In the 2007 film Om Shanti Om, who played the female lead opposite Shah Rukh Khan in her Hindi film debut?
questions.explanation: Om Shanti Om (2007), directed by Farah Khan, marked the Hindi film debut of Deepika Padukone opposite Shah Rukh Khan.

questions.q: Shah Rukh Khan starred in the 2004 cross-border romance Veer-Zaara, directed by which veteran filmmaker?
questions.explanation: Veer-Zaara (2004) was directed by Yash Chopra, with Shah Rukh Khan playing Indian Air Force officer Veer Pratap Singh.

questions.q: In which 1992 film did Shah Rukh Khan make his Hindi film acting debut as a leading man?
questions.explanation: Shah Rukh Khan made his lead film debut in Deewana (1992), opposite Divya Bharti and Rishi Kapoor.

questions.q: Which director gave Shah Rukh Khan his lead film debut with Deewana (1992)?
questions.explanation: Deewana (1992), Shah Rukh Khan's lead film debut, was directed by Raj Kanwar.

questions.q: Shah Rukh Khan won his first Filmfare Best Actor award for playing a negative lead in which 1993 film?
questions.explanation: Shah Rukh Khan won the Filmfare Award for Best Actor for Baazigar (1993), an unusual win for a villainous role.

questions.q: In the 2017 film Raees, Shah Rukh Khan played a bootlegger pursued by a police officer portrayed by which actor?
questions.explanation: In Raees (2017), Nawazuddin Siddiqui played the police officer pursuing Shah Rukh Khan's bootlegger character.

questions.q: In the 2004 film Main Hoon Na, directed by Farah Khan, what was the profession of Shah Rukh Khan's character Major Ram?
options: An army officer going undercover at a college
questions.explanation: In Main Hoon Na (2004), Shah Rukh Khan played Major Ram Prasad Sharma, an army officer who goes undercover as a college student.

questions.q: In Yash Raj Films' Fan (2016), Shah Rukh Khan played a dual role of a film superstar and which other character?
questions.explanation: In Fan (2016), Shah Rukh Khan played both superstar Aryan Khanna and Gaurav, an obsessive look-alike fan.

questions.q: Shah Rukh Khan's Pathaan (2023) is part of which interconnected film franchise produced by Yash Raj Films?
questions.explanation: Pathaan (2023) is part of the YRF Spy Universe, which also includes the Tiger and War film series.

questions.q: In the 1995 film Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge, the character played by Shah Rukh Khan refuses to elope with Simran, insisting on winning over whose approval first?
questions.explanation: In Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge, Shah Rukh Khan's Raj refuses to elope, insisting on first winning the approval of Simran's father, played by Amrish Puri.
